title: Validate Multipart Uploads with FastAPI
summary: Validate one multipart upload in FastAPI with filename, content type, and file size checks.
verification_setup: Install fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, and python-multipart in the active Python environment.
verification_notes: Validated with Python 3.9.6 on macOS using unittest and FastAPI TestClient. Verified behavior covers valid uploads, blank filenames, unsupported content types, empty files, oversized files, exact-limit files, sanitized basenames, and the explicit content-type allowlist.
